blended.narrative: Edelweiss Valley is expecting dry conditions over the next 48 hours. Looking ahead, 22 inches possible over the next 14 days. Mild temps with highs near 47°F.

daily_summary.narrative: Wednesday: 8" of heavy snow, highs of 37°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Thursday: 2.6" of snow, highs of 33°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Sunday: 2.5" of snow, highs of 27°F. Expect powder.
Monday: 6" of snow, highs of 34°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
